nonBlockingIssues.description: HTML comment syntax `<!-- Voting Section -->` used instead of HEEx comment syntax `<%!-- --%>`
has_unique_violation?/2 uses string matching to detect unique constraint violations which could theoretically break if Ecto's error message format changes
@spec for market_status/2 missing :closed status in type spec
@moduledoc mentions 'three states' but should mention four including :closed
format_status/1 function duplicated in MarketListLive.ex - could be extracted to shared helper in future refactoring

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance about using semantic data-* attributes (e.g., data-market-state, data-option-id, data-vote-count) for test assertions in LiveView templates. This pattern enables precise element selection in tests and improves test reliability.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: user-market-browse-and-state-pages used data-* attributes extensively (data-market-state, data-option-id, data-vote-count) which enabled clean test selectors like [data-market-state='active'] in tests

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker correctly followed Phoenix 1.8 LiveView form handling pattern using to_form/2 and <.form for={@form}>
rejectedObservations.reason: Already-documented - AGENTS.md already specifies these conventions

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker correctly used cond do instead of if/else if for multiple conditions
rejectedObservations.reason: Already-documented - AGENTS.md already forbids else if syntax

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker correctly used [...] list syntax for class attributes with conditional classes
rejectedObservations.reason: Already-documented - AGENTS.md already specifies this pattern

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker followed the phoenix-fullstack-worker skill procedure correctly
rejectedObservations.reason: Procedural confirmation, not knowledge that needs documentation
